name: @codesteward/webhooks
description: SCM webhook handlers (GitHub App Gate path)

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/**/*.test.ts src/__tests__/**/*.test.ts 2>/dev/null || node --test dist/**/*.test.js 2>/dev/null || node --import tsx --test $(find src -name "*.test.ts" 2>/dev/null | tr "\n" " ")
